title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-24
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got counted
gist.blurb: The daily garden walk is complete: app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes have been refreshed. The bees remain extremely committed to paperwork.
gist.summary: Automated daily updates refreshed app metrics, health-check results, and the community greenhouse listings in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have an up-to-date snapshot of listed apps and their current health status.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a careful garden keeper with a tiny clipboard, checking labeled code-plants in a cozy greenhouse while a CRT monitor robot displays simple healthy-growth charts. The greenhouse and plants represent the app directory, health checks, and refreshed metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm community greenhouse where Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush and light blue wings, wears a tiny gardener hat and checks code-plants with a clipboard beside a CRT monitor robot showing a lime green (#ecf874) health chart. Flowers, vines, app-label signs, and softly glowing retro terminals fill the pastel mint-and-cream garden; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
